# cobbler_template_file (Data Source)

Use this data source to get the details of a Cobbler template file.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the template file.

### Read-Only

- `body` (String) The body of the template file.
